name: View Transitions — global CSS recipes
description: Copy these blocks into a global stylesheet (e.g. globals.css). Tune only :root durations after initial integration.

metadata.intent: Ship consistent VT animations with reduced-motion safety

must_use: Include reduced-motion block in production CSS
must_not: Invent one-off VT keyframes per screen without sharing the recipe set
conventions: Match class names exactly to `enter`/`exit`/`share` props on `<ViewTransition>`.
